name: [PDF] Pirate Parties: The Social Movements of Electronic Democracy
snippet: PPs apply crowdsourcing for political organizing and decision- making: using GitHub or reddit, party members organize, debate, and decide online (Edick 2015).

name: "Pirate is a State of Mind" - Democracy Technologies
snippet: The global network of Pirate Parties has pioneered the application of digital technologies to democracy and the promotion of human rights.

name: A digital party organisation? Evolution of the Czech Pirates
snippet: We examine the digital party model using the Czech Pirates as a case study. The party was initially organised through an online platform.
